case_title: ELLEY CHU VS. EVA CHIA HUA LIU

docket_entries.description: EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUL-01-2009 ORDERED DESTROYED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-01-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-01-2009 BY DONALD SULLIVAN. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. HEARD IN DEPT. 318.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-01-2009 - JUDGMENT.
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO DEFENDANT LIU, EVA CHIA HUA ADDITIONAL PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $120.00 FILED BY CHU, ELLEY AS TO DEFENDANT LIU, EVA CHIA HUA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-01-2009 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
POS NOT ENTERED, RE: NO NAME OF PERSON SERVED.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHU, ELLEY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT LIU, EVA CHIA HUA CLAIM DENIED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
